seoTitle: Tawonga South vs Taylor Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tawonga South and Taylor Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tawonga South vs Taylor Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tawonga South and Taylor Bay.
heading: Tawonga South vs Taylor Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tawonga South, Victoria and Taylor Bay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tawonga South has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Taylor Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tawonga South or Taylor Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tawonga South has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Taylor Bay scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tawonga South scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Taylor Bay scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tawonga South or Taylor Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tawonga South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
